#Data Visualization
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

plt.style.use('ggplot')

In [3]:
df['discounted_price'] = pd.to_numeric(
    df['discounted_price'].str.replace('₹','', regex=False).str.replace(',','', regex=False),
    errors='coerce'
)

df['actual_price'] = pd.to_numeric(
    df['actual_price'].str.replace('₹','', regex=False).str.replace(',','', regex=False),
    errors='coerce'
)

df['discount_percentage'] = pd.to_numeric(
    df['discount_percentage'].str.replace('%','', regex=False),
    errors='coerce'
)

df['rating'] = pd.to_numeric(df['rating'], errors='coerce')

df['rating_count'] = pd.to_numeric(
    df['rating_count'].astype(str).str.replace(',','', regex=False),
    errors='coerce'
)
In [4]:
plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))

top_categories = df['category'].value_counts().head(10)

sns.barplot(x=top_categories.values,
            y=top_categories.index)

plt.title("Top 10 Product Categories")
plt.xlabel("Number of Products")
plt.ylabel("Category")

plt.show()
In [5]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))

sns.histplot(df['rating'], bins=10)

plt.title("Distribution of Product Ratings")
plt.xlabel("Rating")
plt.ylabel("Count")

plt.show()
In [6]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))

sns.histplot(df['discount_percentage'], bins=15)

plt.title("Discount Percentage Distribution")

plt.xlabel("Discount %")

plt.show()
In [7]:
top = df.sort_values("rating", ascending=False).head(10)

plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))

sns.barplot(x="rating",
            y="product_name",
            data=top)

plt.title("Top Rated Products")

plt.show()
In [8]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))

plt.scatter(df['actual_price'],
            df['discounted_price'])

plt.xlabel("Actual Price")

plt.ylabel("Discounted Price")

plt.title("Actual Price vs Discounted Price")

plt.show()
In [9]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))

sns.boxplot(x=df['discounted_price'])

plt.title("Boxplot of Discounted Price")

plt.show()
In [10]:
top_reviews = df.sort_values("rating_count",
                             ascending=False).head(10)

plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))

sns.barplot(x="rating_count",
            y="product_name",
            data=top_reviews)

plt.title("Most Reviewed Products")

plt.show()
In [11]:
fig, ax = plt.subplots(2,2, figsize=(14,10))

sns.histplot(df['rating'], ax=ax[0,0])

sns.boxplot(x=df['discounted_price'], ax=ax[0,1])

sns.scatterplot(
    x="actual_price",
    y="discounted_price",
    data=df,
    ax=ax[1,0]
)

sns.histplot(df['discount_percentage'], ax=ax[1,1])

plt.tight_layout()

plt.show()
